violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Staff washed, rinsed, and sanitized the can opener and slicer during this inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/14/2023
The sneeze guard at the self service area was not placed correctly to protect the foods. Sneeze guard shall be adjusted. New Violation. Correct By: 12/14/2023
The food prep counters at the hot food stations were not in good repair. Counters observed cracked. Equipment shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/25/2024
The gaskets located in the hot holding oven door was not in good repair. Gasket shall be repaired or replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 12/28/2023
